patches.find: undercuts at least 6 WINs and arguably more.
patches.replace: directly undercuts 2 WINs (WIN-016, WIN-065) that explicitly invoke aetheric refraction, and weakens at least 4 more (WIN-017, WIN-026, WIN-033, WIN-056) for which dome geometry would require aetheric refraction or an equivalent unfalsifiable escape hatch to reconcile its predictions with observations.
patches.rationale: ISS-426: Claim that it undercuts at least 6 WINs was technically accurate but misleading — only 2 WINs explicitly invoke refraction in their text. The section earlier correctly distinguishes the two categories but the conclusion collapsed them. Updated to clearly state 2 explicit + 4 implicit, matching the careful wording in the preceding paragraphs.
